sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_struct AS SELECT struct_insert({'x': 10}, y := 20) AS my_struct;
UPDATE test_struct SET my_struct = struct_insert(my_struct, d := 4) WHERE my_struct['x'] = 10;
SELECT my_struct['y'], my_struct['c'], my_struct['d'] FROM test_struct;
CREATE TABLE nested_struct AS SELECT struct_insert(struct_insert({'outer': {'inner': 'value'}}, new_field := 'new value'), another_field := 'another value') AS complex_struct;
